name: Carrot Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Solo, Simon Fischer or Baker brand prune plum lekvar filling
4 large egg whites (I use Balas dry egg whites)
2 cups flour (I use part whole wheat)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Coat a 9 X 13 pan with vegetable spray.
3. Combine carrots, sugar, crushed pineapple, lekvar, egg whites, and vanilla in a bowl; blend thoroughly.
4. Add remaining ingredients (flour, baking soda, cinnamon, salt, and coconut) to the mixture; mix completely until no lumps remain.
5. Pour batter into the prepared pan.
6. Bake for about 45 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
